reviewTitle: The hub our whole team lives in
pros: Channels keep cross-team conversations organized, and the search makes it easy to find past decisions. Huddles replaced most of our quick calls.
cons: Notifications can get noisy without careful channel hygiene, and threads are easy to miss.
problemsSolved: Cut down internal email and gave us one searchable place for project discussions.
recommendations: Set up notification defaults and naming conventions before rolling out company-wide.
whySwitched: Wanted a cleaner channel model and better third-party app integrations.
reviewText: Channels keep cross-team conversations organized... Cut down internal email...
markdownContent:
## Slack — 5/5
**The hub our whole team lives in**

**Pros:** Channels keep cross-team conversations organized; great search; huddles.

**Cons:** Notifications can get noisy; threads easy to miss.

**Switched from:** Microsoft Teams — wanted a cleaner channel model.

reviewTitle: Flexible docs and wikis in one place
pros: Blocks make it easy to build docs, wikis, and lightweight databases without separate tools.
cons: Performance can lag on very large workspaces, and offline mode is limited.
problemsSolved: Replaced three separate tools for notes, project tracking, and our internal wiki.
whySwitched: Wanted one flexible workspace instead of separate wiki and note apps.
reviewText: Blocks make it easy to build docs, wikis, and lightweight databases... Replaced three separate tools...
markdownContent:
## Notion — 4/5
**Flexible docs and wikis in one place**

**Pros:** Blocks for docs, wikis, lightweight databases.

**Cons:** Laggy on large workspaces; limited offline.

**Switched from:** Confluence, Evernote.
